# TimeBunny

> A kawaii AI schedule builder and Atomic Habits companion that turns your calendar, energy, and long-term goals into a focused daily plan with a built-in Pomodoro timer.

TimeBunny helps users design productive days using a retro-pixel bunny mascot. It pulls fixed events from Google Calendar, asks about current energy and stress, and generates a schedule aligned with long-term goals. Hourly vibe checks adjust the plan, and a Pomodoro timer powers each focus block.

## Pages
- [Home — schedule builder](/): Build today's AI-assisted schedule from your calendar, energy, stress, and goals.
- [Pomodoro Timer](/pomodoro): Full-screen focus timer for the current task with an Up Next panel.
- [Long-Term Goals](/goals): Atomic-Habits-style goal tracker with AI suggestions for filling schedule gaps.
- [Moodboard](/moodboard): Aesthetic moodboard powered by Pinterest-style image search.
- [Vibe Check](/vibe-check): Hourly motivation check-in that adjusts the rest of the day.

## Optional
- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for saving schedules and goals.
